name: iShares Trust
description: iShares Trust is a prominent series of exchange-traded funds (ETFs) managed by BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager. The trust offers a comprehensive range of investment products designed to provide investors with efficient access to various asset classes, including domestic and international equities, fixed income, and commodities. By tracking specific market indices, iShares ETFs aim to provide transparent, liquid, and cost-effective investment solutions for both individual and institutional investors seeking to build diversified portfolios across global financial markets.
